title: GMS Week 34 - METHOD TO THE MADNESS?
section_path: GMS Week 34 - METHOD TO THE MADNESS?
section_path_text: GMS Week 34 - METHOD TO THE MADNESS?
summary:
Main
in Weekly Demolition Reports 25/08/2025
Image reference: 2025-08-25_gms-week-34-method-to-the-madness_img1.jpg
A week after the anticipated Trump - Putin (TP) meeting (chuckle at that one) last week, not much positive has come out of it, especially as Putin returned to Russia only to launch another offensive against Ukrainian oil refineries causing disruptions along the Druzhba pipeline. As oil traders still look for optimism under the current climate, in a slightly positive turn of events, U.S. oil reserves reportedly decreased by about 3 million barrels last week thanks to cheaper prices and a growing domestic demand, in what is seen as a potential force multiplier that could help boost oil prices in September - especially if this trend continues.
